title: Introducing the Statistical Programmer Interview Series
description:
'Where the Role of a Statistical Programmer Can Take You'
See what is in store for you to learn during this video interview series; from advice on what it takes to become successful in the field and the challenges faced, to the future of data science, there is plenty to take from our panel of professionals.
playlistTitle: Where the Role of a Statistical Programmer Can Take You

title: Where the Role of a Statistical Programmer Can Take You – An Interview with Martin Lindhard
description:
The role of a statistical programmer can lead to many different avenues. Learn more about this rewarding journey as well as how to navigate the challenges that come along the way.
PHUSE conducted an interview with Martin Lindhard (Novo Nordisk) to share their story and provide an insight to 'Where the Role of a Statistical Programmer Can Take You'. 
If you enjoyed this video you can find more content on industry topics on the PHUSE Blog: https://phuse.global/Communications/PHUSE_Blog/1
playlistTitle: Where the Role of a Statistical Programmer Can Take You
